rationale: Protected composition must remain effectively pixel-stable on desktop. The broader full-page ceiling accommodates approved portrait, aluminum-card and latest-fact content changes; those page-scoped regions and their measured downstream shifts are registered before enforcing the protected threshold. Below 1180 px, Chromium full-page raster tiling changes when allowlisted dynamic cards alter page height, so the deterministic gate is exact baseline reproduction plus protected DOM width/height geometry within four pixels; full-page ratios remain recorded as informational evidence.
